question: Will the CDC raise the Travel Health Notice status of Colombia to above level 3 before June 1, 2025?
background: [Colombia’s Economic Emergency As Yellow Fever Outbreak Threatens Tourism And Agricultural Exports](https://www.travelandtourworld.com/news/article/colombias-economic-emergency-as-yellow-fever-outbreak-threatens-tourism-and-agricultural-exports/) | CDC: [Travel Health Notices](https://wwwnc.cdc.gov/travel/notices)
resolution_criteria: This question resolves as **Yes** if the [Travel Health Notice status of Colombia](https://wwwnc.cdc.gov/travel/destinations/traveler/none/colombia), which is "Level 2 Practice Enhanced Precautions" at the time of this question, is a level of greater than 2 when checked by Metaculus on or after June 1, 2025.
